diagnostic: Integration connects pipes. Intelligence reads what flows through them. The ROI of integration is near zero without a synthesis layer that transforms connected data into actionable strategic insight.
answer: Integration connects pipes. Intelligence reads what flows through them. The ROI of integration is near zero without a synthesis layer that transforms connected data into actionable strategic insight.
description: Synthesis deficit — millions invested in software, but the CEO is still guessing. Systems record the 'what' but nobody synthesizes the 'so what.'
symptom: Five dashboards open, none telling the truth. MES says 90% efficiency but revenue is flat. CRM shows growth but churn is silent.
